name: Alex Martin
title: Senior Technical Recruiter
summary: 8 years of TA across deep-tech startups. Hired engineers for AI/infra/data teams, ran sourcing, owned ATS migrations, partnered with hiring managers across France/UK/Germany. Comfortable with ICs, leads and execs.

Partnered with VPE on workforce planning and leveling
Helped with employer branding across LinkedIn and X
